prompt: Generate a screenshot of gantt chart interface, with a clean, modern software interface, inspired by the reference layout.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a modern Gantt chart interface. The design should adopt the clean, minimalist aesthetic and professional layout of image 1, featuring a light color scheme, clear typography, and flat design elements. Include a top navigation bar with application branding, main menu items, search, and user profile details, similar to the top section of image 1. A left sidebar, akin to image 1, should contain project-specific navigation icons and labels. The primary Gantt chart view, displaying tasks, dependencies, and timelines, should occupy the main content area.
objects: Screenshot of a modern Gantt chart interface
Main menu items in top navigation
User profile details in top navigation
Project-specific navigation icons in left sidebar
Project-specific navigation labels in left sidebar
Primary Gantt chart view displaying tasks, dependencies, and timelines
